creator: olle@dalnix.se
text:
(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #1)

(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #1)

Hello and thank you for looking into this. I have the same problem. My make showconfig:

===> The following configuration options are available for nginx-1.24.0_12,3:
     DEBUG=off: Build with debugging support

====> Modules that require HTTP module
